title: Recursion
summary: Performs syntax-level recursive elimination of normal jets and defines the formal obstruction expression formalP.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Performs syntax-level recursive elimination of normal jets and defines the formal obstruction expression formalP.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Juhlformula/Juhlcombinatorics/Recursion.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Substitute all formal normal jets using a substitution function. In explicit terms, for σ of type the natural numbers maps to formal expr, its defining expression is | zero maps to zero | one maps to one | rat q maps to rat q | k maps to k | f maps to f | F m maps to σ m | tr j maps to tr j | add A B maps to subst F σ A plus subst F σ B | neg A maps to minus subst F σ A | mul A B maps to subst F σ A times subst F σ B | op D j A maps to op D j subst F σ A.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{zero})&=\operatorname{zero}\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{one})&=\operatorname{one}\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{rat} q)&=\operatorname{rat} q\\\operatorname{substF}(k)&=k\\\operatorname{substF}(f)&=f\\\operatorname{substF}(F m)&=σ m\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{tr} j)&=\operatorname{tr} j\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{add} A B)&=\operatorname{substF} σ A + \operatorname{substF} σ B\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{neg} A)&=- \operatorname{substF} σ A\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{mul} A B)&=\operatorname{substF} σ A \cdot \operatorname{substF} σ B\\\operatorname{substF}(\operatorname{opD} j A)&=\operatorname{opD} j (\operatorname{substF} σ A)\end{aligned}
correspondence.leanType: def substF (σ : ℕ → FormalExpr) : FormalExpr → FormalExpr

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The scalar used to solve L_s = 0 for F_{s+1}. In explicit terms, for ell, s in the natural numbers, its defining expression is - highest Coeff ell s ⁻¹.

Recursive formal solution for normal jets. In explicit terms, for ell in the natural numbers, its defining expression is | 0 maps to Formal Expr.f | s plus 1 maps to let σ : the natural numbers maps to Formal Expr : equals the function sending m to if hm : m is at most s then solved Jet Aux ell m else Formal Expr.F m Formal Expr.qsmul solve Step Coeff ell s Formal Expr.subst F σ Lrest ell s termination by n maps to n decreasing by exact Nat.lt succ of le hm.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}\operatorname{solvedJetAux}(0)&=f_{\mathrm{FormalExpr}}\\\operatorname{solvedJetAux}(s + 1)&=\operatorname{let} σ \colon \mathbb{N} \longrightarrow \operatorname{FormalExpr} = m \longmapsto \operatorname{if} \operatorname{hm} \colon m \le s \operatorname{then} \operatorname{solvedJetAux} \operatorname{ell} m \operatorname{else} F_{\mathrm{FormalExpr}} m \operatorname{FormalExpr}.\operatorname{qsmul} (\operatorname{solveStepCoeff} \operatorname{ell} s) (\operatorname{FormalExpr}.\operatorname{substF} σ (\operatorname{Lrest} \operatorname{ell} s)) \operatorname{termination\_by} n => n \operatorname{decreasing\_by} \operatorname{exact} \mathbb{N}.\operatorname{lt\_succ\_of\_le} \operatorname{hm}\end{aligned}

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The formal normal jet F_m solved from the obstruction recursion. In explicit terms, for ell, m in the natural numbers, its defining expression is solved Jet Aux ell m.
For ell in the natural numbers, solved Jet ell 0 equals Formal Expr.f.
correspondence.leanType: theorem solvedJet_zero (ell : ℕ) : solvedJet ell 0 = FormalExpr.f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Substitute every normal jet by the solved formal jet. In explicit terms, for ell in the natural numbers, its defining expression is the function sending m to solved Jet ell m.
obstruction Coeff 1 equals Formal Expr.subst F solved Subst 1 Lcoeff 1 0.

The formal obstruction operator P_{2 ell} applied to the boundary value f. In explicit terms, for ell in the natural numbers, its defining expression is Formal Expr.qsmul a Ell Inv ell obstruction Coeff ell.

references.locator: Formal Juhl-type formula and OR bridge
references.note: Primary source for the intended curved OR–Juhl identity.
Source for the Juhl side of the formal syntax.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
